title: Whats your favourite music from Evangelion
display_title: Whats your favourite music from Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Concerns » Fri Aug 20, 2021 9:29 am What's your favourite music from Evangelion? Mine would be (in no particular order): - Jesus Bleibet Meine Freude - Sakura Nagashi - Rei I - Hedgehog's Dilemma - Fly me to the moon

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by EvaChero » Fri Aug 20, 2021 9:45 am I'm still pretty hung on "Beautiful World" myself.

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Fri Aug 20, 2021 10:23 am Komm, susser Tod Beautiful world One Last Kiss This Is The Dream Beyond Belief Cruel Angels Thesis False Rebirth Everything You've Ever Dreamed

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Aug 20, 2021 1:31 pm I have an entire playlist dedicated to my favorite pieces from Evangelion. If I had to pick just five songs, these would be: 1 - B-9 Infantile Dependence, Adult Dependency 2 - Everything You've Ever Dreamed 3 - Komm, Süsser Tod 4 - Separation Anxiety 5 - Expansion of Blockade The end of episode 25 (in which Asuka, Shinji and Misato are on stage, while B-9 Infantile Dependence, Adult Dependency is playing in the background ) must be one of my favorite moments from Evangelion. It's the ultimate collision of the three cases covered during this finale. The way the camera moves back and reveals the characters looking at themselves on stage is just amazing (Misato's description of Human Instrumentality makes me shiver). Perfect scene.

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Viatori » Sat Aug 21, 2021 9:48 pm A Cruel Angels Thesis Jesus Bleibet Meine Freude Komm süsser tod Rei I Rei II Hand of fate Beautiful World

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by YTPrenewed » Tue Aug 24, 2021 6:31 pm I feel like I can't pick just one because different songs are good for different sorts of feelings, each vital to show's contrast in tone. I'd have to have separate categories for the tone they each create: Cruel Angel's Thesis: Anticipation. Of course. And it goes so well with displaying a montage of aspects of the show you've either already heard of or are learning about as you go. The reprise thereof: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by PSIWasHere » Thu Aug 26, 2021 1:55 pm I think generally Evangelion has my favourite OST of all time but I'm gonna have to be severely basic here and say that Komm Susser Todd is not only my favourite Evangelion song but my favourite song of all time, It is the only song that harbours such complex emotions and themes and it never fails to make me cry which no other song has been able to accomplish, makes revisiting EOE hard. Also euro nerv is my favourite version of Decisive Battle and I was completely astonished when I first heard it. I also must say that Kokoro Yo Genshi Ni Modore is insanely underrated in terms of Evangelion Music.

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Monarch » Thu Aug 26, 2021 9:12 pm My favourite tracks from the series would probably be: Hedgehog’s Dilemma Decisive Battle Komm, Susser Tod Fly me to the moon Sakura Nagashi One Last Kiss

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Thu Aug 26, 2021 10:33 pm Cruel Angel’s Thesis. That intro is fire(which is sort of a contrast to the show’s actual theme).

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by walucigi » Mon Aug 30, 2021 7:46 am Besides the opening theme, I've been really into the Dilemmatic triangle opera (specifically the Ayanami vers.). It's literally one of the best songs Edit 091521: Aaand now I've been obsessed with Lost in the Memory (with Mike Wyzgowski). It's just a beautiful song and I've been trying to figure out the notes for the guitar parts

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Berserker » Wed Sep 15, 2021 9:01 am Cruel angel's thesis Fly Me to the Moon Both of You, Dance Like You Want to Win! Those women longed for the touch of others' lips, and thus invited their kisses Good, Or Don't be Thanatos M-8 Chorus Delay Komm, susser Tod Destiny Fate Kyou no Hi wa Sayonara Tsubasa Wo Kudasai

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Sep 15, 2021 9:58 am In no particular order (except Tamashii no Refrain at #1 because that shit SLAPS) Tamashii no Refrain Sakura Nagashi Rei I Ultimate Soldier The Beast I/II Decisive Battle A step forward into terror EM20 =wunder operation= Paris/Euro Nerv Fate Marking time, waiting for death In my Spirit Scarred and Battered Dark Defender It will mean Victory Destiny ACAT KsT Carnage the final decision we all must take prolly a few more that I'm blanking on right now, so much good music in this franchise

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Sep 25, 2021 9:42 am Been listening to all four of the rebuild soundtracks recently and 3.33 just slaps. It's a really great soundtrack start to finish but in particular the five or six songs that accompany the fourth impact sequence amaze me. silvermoonlight wrote: This Is The Dream Beyond Belief

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Sachiel64 » Mon Sep 27, 2021 3:04 am I agree with nearly all the great tracks in this thread so far, but there was one I didn't see anyone mention yet. And goddamn, does Asuka's theme from You Can (Not) Advance, " The Red Ambassador ," get me hyped every time!

[]: Re: What's your favourite music from Evangelion?             Quote Post by Sentient Evangelion » Thu Oct 07, 2021 11:22 pm Hedgehog's Dilemma. Angel Attack. The Beast 1&2. Tokyo-3. NERV. MagmaDiver. Thantos. Rei 1, 2&3. Decisive Battle. Misato. EVA-00. EVA-02. Everything You've Ever Dreamed. Good, Or Don't be. Harbinger Of Tragedy. I. Shinji. EoE's Entire Soundtrack. Next Episode. Those Women Longed For. Des Cordes Opus 1, 2&3. And I could go on, but let's just say that I love NGE's soundtrack entirely. Some of rebuild music is pretty good as well.
